title: Athlete
description: The person being coached. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + branch_id (RESTRICT) + optional user_id (RESTRICT, nullable). Cascades organization + region through branch, application through tenant per hierarchy.md §2. NEVER carries application_id (cascades through tenant), organization_id (cascades through branch), region_id (cascades through branch), or scope_node_id (athlete is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer). Ships CONFIDENTIAL-tier emergency contact cluster (name/phone/relationship, gated by athlete.view.emergency_contact) + REGULATED_HEALTH-tier medical cluster (conditions/allergies/medications/notes, gated by athlete.view.medical). Consent snapshot (photo/medical/third_party booleans + recorded_at + recorded_by_user_id) covers GDPR Art. 8 parental-consent requirements for minors + safeguarding sign-off.

user_id.description: OPTIONAL — set only when the athlete has a login. Adults create their own user_id at signup; minors typically remain unlinked until 13-16 depending on jurisdiction. RESTRICT — the User cannot be soft-deleted or archived while an active Athlete row references it.

external_id.description: External CRM/CMS integration ID. Unique per (tenant_id, external_id) when non-null.

first_name.description: The athlete's first name. Confidential-tier when the athlete is a minor (redacted from cross-tenant support tooling).

preferred_name.description: The 'call me' name. Used in front-of-house UI.

date_of_birth.description: CRITICAL for age eligibility + AgeGroup snapshot resolution. Immutable post-create — a DOB edit is a compliance event (typo-fix path requires super_admin override).

gender.description: Enum: male / female / non_binary / prefer_not_to_say / other. Nullable — self-declaration is optional.

dominant_hand.description: Enum: left / right / ambidextrous. Relevant for sport-specific coaching (tennis, cricket, boxing).

primary_language.description: BCP-47 code. e.g. 'en-US', 'ar-EG'. Used for notification routing.

profile_photo_url.description: Bare URL. Wave 4+ Storage module owns upload workflow.

current_age_group_id.description: Snapshot — recomputed nightly by RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob against the tenant's active AgeGroup catalog. Nullable when the athlete's DOB falls outside every defined group (rare — the platform floor + ceiling covers 3-100 years).

current_age_group_snapshot_at.description: When the snapshot was last computed. Reads > 48h old trigger an in-band refresh.

emergency_contact_name.description: CONFIDENTIAL-tier. Redacted unless caller carries athlete.view.emergency_contact. Hard-redacted 90 days post-archive.

medical_conditions.description: REGULATED_HEALTH-tier (safeguarding-critical). Free-text description of chronic conditions (asthma, diabetes, epilepsy). Requires athlete.view.medical permission for read.

medical_allergies.description: REGULATED_HEALTH-tier. Free-text. Life-critical when the athlete attends sessions with catering.

medical_medications.description: REGULATED_HEALTH-tier. Current medications the coaches need to know about (inhalers, epipens, insulin).

medical_notes.description: REGULATED_HEALTH-tier. Free-form additional notes (previous injuries, dietary restrictions, mental-health considerations).

consent_photo_release.description: Permission to use in tenant marketing.

consent_medical_disclosure.description: Permission to share medical fields with coaches (not just HR).

consent_third_party.description: Permission to share with insurance / subprocessors.

consent_recorded_at.description: When consents were last confirmed. Null = never explicitly recorded (implicit signup consent only).

consent_recorded_by_user_id.description: The User who recorded consents (typically the primary AthleteGuardian for minors, or the athlete themselves post-adulthood). SET NULL on User archive so the audit trail survives while the reference is nulled.

status.description: Enum: active / paused / graduated / withdrawn / archived.

registration_notes.description: HR/admin visible only — never surfaced to the athlete/guardian on read.

withdrawal_reason.description: Enum: relocated / graduated_out / lost_interest / financial / injury / disciplinary / conflict / other. Required when status transitions to withdrawn.

withdrawn_by_user_id.description: The User who filed the withdrawal (parent or admin).

graduated_at.description: Date the athlete graduated (aged out of program, completed final season, etc.).

paused_at.description: Timestamp of current pause. Null when status != 'paused'.

paused_reason.description: Free-text reason. Confidential — never surfaced to non-HR.

indexes.name: athletes_tenant_user_active_unique
indexes.predicate: user_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: One active Athlete row per (tenant, user). A single user cannot be two athletes in the same tenant. Rehires / re-registrations must archive first.

indexes.name: athletes_tenant_external_id_unique
indexes.predicate: external_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

indexes.name: athletes_consent_idx
indexes.description: Feeds ReconcileAthleteConsentsJob — sweeps consents past the 12-month re-consent cadence.

full_name.description: Computed. `first_name` + ` ` + `last_name` (middle name omitted from the display shortcut).

age_years.description: Computed. Whole-years age based on date_of_birth + today.

consent_summary.description: Computed. { photo_release, medical_disclosure, third_party, recorded_at, recorded_by_user_id, expires_at }.

x-invariants: One active Athlete row per (tenant_id, user_id) — enforced by partial unique index when user_id IS NOT NULL
user_id is IMMUTABLE post-create IF non-null on create; the /link-user route is the ONLY way to attach a user post-create (never re-attach a different one)
branch_id is IMMUTABLE post-create in Wave 3a — branch transfer flow lands Wave 3b
date_of_birth is IMMUTABLE post-create — DOB is compliance-critical for age-group eligibility. Typo fix requires super_admin override event
date_of_birth cannot be in the future OR more than 100 years in the past (platform bounds; enforced by valid_dob rule)
date_of_birth must place the athlete within the platform age range (>= 3 AND <= 100 as of today; refuses 'newborn' + 'ancient' data)

status transitions: active ↔ paused; active → graduated (terminal); active → withdrawn (terminal, requires withdrawal_reason); {active, paused, graduated, withdrawn} → archived (terminal); archived → active only via /restore within retention window
medical_* fields refused unless athlete_medical_tracking entitlement is on AND caller has athlete.manage.medical permission
emergency_contact_* fields refused unless caller has athlete.manage.emergency_contact permission
consent_recorded_at MUST be set when any consent_* transitions from false to true
consent_recorded_by_user_id MUST be set when consent_recorded_at is set

For minors (age_years < config.athlete.minor_min_age), consent_recorded_by_user_id MUST resolve to a User with an active AthleteGuardian row on this athlete AND has_legal_custody=true (Wave 3b: hooked when AthleteGuardian module lands; Wave 3a: soft-enforced with rule)
withdrawal_reason required when status transitions to withdrawn
graduated_at required when status transitions to graduated
paused_at + paused_reason required when status transitions to paused
current_age_group_id, when set, MUST reference an AgeGroup where the athlete's age falls within [min_age_inclusive, max_age_inclusive]
